content:
Given the undirected dynamic graph with the edges:
[(1, 7, 0), (2, 4, 2), (1, 2, 4), (5, 6, 4), (3, 8, 9), (2, 5, 11), (3, 6, 14), (1, 5, 15), (0, 8, 21), (4, 7, 22), (4, 6, 23), (5, 9, 25), (2, 7, 26), (6, 8, 26), (3, 9, 27)]

We need to find the nodes linked with node 8 exactly at time 21.

First, we will scan each edge (u, v, t) and collect the other node whenever the time t matches the queried time AND one of the nodes matches the queried node.

* Edge (1, 7, 0) has node 1 and time 0. -> Ignore.
* Edge (2, 4, 2) has node 2 and time 2. -> Add node 4.
* Edge (1, 2, 4) has node 1 and time 4. -> Add node 2.
* Edge (5, 6, 4) has node 5 and time 4. -> Add node 6.
* Edge (3, 8, 9) has node 3 and time 9. -> Add node 8.
* Edge (2, 5, 11) has node 2 and time 11. -> Add node 5.
* Edge (3, 6, 14) has node 3 and time 14. -> Add node 6.
* Edge (1, 5, 15) has node 1 and time 15. -> Add node 5.
* Edge (0, 8, 21) has node 0 and time 21. -> Add node 8.
* Edge (4, 7, 22) has node 4 and time 22. -> Add node 7.
* Edge (4, 6, 23) has node 4 and time 23. -> Add node 6.
* Edge (5, 9, 25) has node 5 and time 25. -> Add node 9.
* Edge (2, 7, 26) has node 2 and time 26. -> Add node 7.
* Edge (6, 8, 26) has node 6 and time 26. -> Add node 8.
* Edge (3, 9, 27) has node 3 and time 27. -> Add node 9.

Now we have collected all nodes that are linked with node 8 at time 21.

Answer: [8, 4, 7, 6, 9]
